items.title: Trauma's toll on the workforce
items.description_ko: 트라우마를 경험했다고 응답한 직원들은 적응력·학습·몰입 등 주요 업무 지표와 직무 만족도가 전반적으로 더 낮게 나타났습니다.
items.chart_image_alt: Employees who report experiencing trauma describe lower levels of work performance and satisfaction as measured in six important areas.
items.report_title: How leaders can help their organizations metabolize strain

items.title: Agentic AI Turns Every Team into Its Own Transformation Engine
items.description_en: As organisations adopt agentic AI, transformation shifts from centralised programs to team-led workflow redesign, becoming less a rollout and an evolution in how teams work.
